known_limitations: Selection and periodization are curator judgments rather than source-native classifications.
Primary corporate records for the FTX exposure, 2023 restructuring, and later financing remain incomplete.
research_gaps: Recover ATMTA financial disclosures, staffing records, financing documents, and contemporary executive statements for the 2022-2023 contraction.
Measure the player and economic consequences of major transitions using reconciled product and transaction data.
